text:
For nvidia-driver, <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#x-configuration-nvidia> refers to <https://www.nvidia.com/Download/driverResults.aspx/205466/en-us/>

>  Version: 	535.54.03

That became outdated with bug 273357. 

The NVIDIA page for 535.104.05 is as shown under <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Graphics#nvidia>
